entities.name: DIGITAL AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The application of digital technologies to enhance agricultural practices and delivery to farmers

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers operating on a small scale who are the primary targets for digital transformation

entities.name: SMART FARMING
entities.description: A technology solution within digital agriculture to optimize farm management

entities.name: PRECISION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A farming management concept based on observing, measuring, and responding to variability in crops

entities.name: DATA-DRIVEN DECISION SUPPORT
entities.description: Systems that use data to help farmers make informed decisions

entities.name: EXTENSION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems used to disseminate agricultural knowledge and technology to farmers

entities.name: MARKET ACCESS
entities.description: The ability of farmers to reach markets to sell their produce

entities.name: FINANCIAL SERVICES
entities.description: Services providing credit, insurance, and other financial tools to farmers

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The financial gain generated from farming activities

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agriculture

entities.name: WOMEN
entities.description: Female individuals involved in agriculture

entities.name: YOUTH
entities.description: Young individuals involved in agriculture

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SDGS
entities.description: Sustainable Development Goals established by the United Nations

entities.name: CGIAR RESEARCH INITIATIVE ON DIGITAL INNOVATION
entities.description: A research initiative focused on generating digital innovations for agriculture

entities.name: ONLINE PLATFORMS FOR RESEARCH AND LEARNING
entities.description: Digital tools used for knowledge sharing and academic research

entities.name: DIGITAL TWIN SYSTEMS
entities.description: Virtual representations of physical agricultural assets or processes

entities.name: INDEX FOR ASSESSING DIGITAL INCLUSIVENESS
entities.description: A tool used to measure the extent to which digital technologies are accessible to all

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING ANALYTICS
entities.description: The use of satellite or aerial imagery to analyze agricultural data

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where the digital transformation of agriculture is being focused

relationships.target: ONLINE PLATFORMS FOR RESEARCH AND LEARNING
